response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack and systems engineer with genuine staff-level credibility, but the role demands 8+ years of production AI/ML experience and he has effectively one month of AI-adjacent work (current role, April 2025). His MCP tooling contribution is a real positive signal, but there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, Python proficiency, multi-agent frameworks, LLM evaluation pipelines, or the kind of customer-facing GenAI delivery the role centers on. His background is strong web/backend engineering, not applied AI.
strengths: Holds Staff-level titles across multiple employers, demonstrating recognised seniority and technical leadership
Active work on Model Context Protocol (MCP) generators and agentic workflow frameworks in current role — directly relevant to key technologies listed
Broad cloud and distributed-systems exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby) provides infrastructure credibility
concerns: No demonstrable AI/ML experience prior to April 2025; the 8-year minimum is not remotely met
Python is absent from the skills section and work history — the primary language for the entire GenAI toolchain this role relies on
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
